01

About

I'm an Executive IT Architect and Sr Software Development Manager at IBM, where I lead globally distributed engineering teams handling multi-billion dollar workload migrations for top 1% clients in Finance and Healthcare. My work spans AI infrastructure, cloud-native architecture, quantum computing, and enterprise security. I speak across 20+ global stages, reaching over half a million developers and technologists worldwide.

BCS Fellow (FBCS)  ·  Distinguished Architect (OpenGroup certified)  ·  DZone Core & MVB  ·  IBM OTA Award Winner  ·  Microsoft MVP (2014–2017)
